arts.ttl: Thomas Muller makes confident Bayern Munich Champions League prediction despite Aston Villa loss
arts.sum: Bayern Munich were beaten 1-0 at Villa Park on Wednesday night after smashing nine goals past Dinamo Zagreb in their opening match but Thomas Muller ins't worried

arts.ttl: Power Rankings: The best teams in Europe
arts.sum: Real Madrid's shock defeat to LOSC Lille and Bayern Munich's equally shocking 1-0 defeat to Aston Villa grabbed most of the column space, while some was also saved for Juventus's dramatic win over RB Leipzig too. Borussia Dortmund earn a spot in the rankings this week thanks to their thumping 7-1 win over an in-form Celtic side in the Champions League in midweek.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala ready for leading role with Germany men’s national team
arts.sum: After a pretty successful campaign on home turf in EURO 2024, the German men’s national team has a lot of experience and veteran leadership to replace. Between Musiala, Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz, and others, the future of the German men’s national team looks to be in good hands.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich taking precautionary approach with Jamal Musiala hip injury
arts.sum: There was a great deal of bemusement when Vincent Kompany made the decision to start Jamal Musiala from the bench in Bayern Munich ’s 1-0 loss at Aston Villa in the Champions League . In total, after he came on for Kingsley Coman to start the second half, Musiala clocked 45 minute plus stoppage time, which perhaps might have been more than Kompany wanted to push for his playmaker.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich’s Leroy Sané keeping an eye on the market amid stiff squad competition; Manchester United eyeing another striker?; PSG to take a run at Liverpool’s Mo Salah; Chelsea scoping Aston Villa’s Jhon Durán; and MORE!
arts.sum: It still feels like Sané will re-up with Bayern Munich, but if the Olise part of the story is true, it could have him thinking about his future. With Kingsley Coman’s status extremely uncertain and Serge Gnabry not 100% solidified with his own spot on the team, Bayern munich could be looking at a complete revamp of the position — something some folks wanted to go down last summer.

arts.ttl: Frankfurt reward Larsson with new contract
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt confirmed a contract extension for young Swedish midfield talent Hugo Larsson on Friday evening.

arts.ttl: Official: VfB Stuttgart’s Jamie Leweling replaces Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala on German national team
arts.sum: The news that Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala would miss the Eintracht Frankfurt this week and the upcoming international games in the UEFA Nations League with the German national team created a void on the roster for Die Mannschaft. The 36-time international from FC Bayern Munich will not be available to national coach Julian Nagelsmann for the two upcoming international matches in the UEFA Nations League against Bosnia and Herzegovina and the Netherlands due to hip problems.

arts.ttl: Preview: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Bayern Munich - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Eintracht Frankfurt and Bayern Munich, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane gushes over Vincent Kompany’s influence as the Bayern Munich boss
arts.sum: In Harry Kane’s first season at Bayern Munich, the team won four of the first five Bundesliga matches and only dropped points in a draw at home against Bayer Leverkusen. I think that suits the team because there are a lot of attacking players who want to score goals or provide assists.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich says Germany’s goalkeeper situation is “difficult to judge”
arts.sum: The DFB squad lost two of its best (debatable) keepers in very quick succession, Bayern Munich ’s Manuel Neuer to retirement, and Ter Stegen to injury. Germany’s new No. 1 keeper, Marc-André ter Stegen, recently picked up a serious injury.
